# YOUR CODE HERE
n = int(input())
people = []

for _ in range(n):
    name, age = input().split()
    age = int(age)
    people.append((name, age))

# Find the index of the youngest person
youngest_index = 0
for i in range(1, n):
    if people[i][1] < people[youngest_index][1]:
        youngest_index = i

# Starting from the youngest, print names in clockwise order
for i in range(n):
    index = (youngest_index + i) % n
    print(people[index][0])
